3.happening: Create the empty list of groups.
3.why: It will collect one list per set of anagrams.

4.happening: Create a used flag for every word, all False.
4.why: We must never place a word in two groups.

5.happening: Consider word i = '{strs[i]}' as a possible new anchor.
5.why: Each ungrouped word can start its own anagram group.
5.invariant: Words before i are already settled.

6.happening: '{strs[i]}' is already in a group â€” skip it.
6.why: It has already been claimed by an earlier anchor.
6.invariant: A word belongs to exactly one group.

6.happening: '{strs[i]}' hasn't been grouped yet â€” it will anchor a new group.
6.why: An ungrouped word seeds a fresh group.
6.invariant: A word belongs to exactly one group.

8.happening: Start a new group holding the anchor '{strs[i]}'.
8.why: Every group begins with its anchor word.
8.invariant: The group so far is exactly the anchor.

9.why: It must not be picked up again.

10.happening: Scan later words with j to find matches for the anchor.
10.why: Only words after i can still be ungrouped candidates.
10.invariant: The anchor group grows only from later words.

11.happening: '{strs[j]}' is already grouped â€” skip it.
11.why: It belongs to an earlier group.
11.invariant: No word is compared once grouped.

11.why: We test whether it is an anagram of the anchor.
11.invariant: Candidates come from indices after i.

13.invariant: Sorted form is the anagram fingerprint.

14.why: We compare fingerprints, not raw words.
14.invariant: Sorted form is the anagram fingerprint.

15.happening: Check whether the two sorted forms are equal.
15.why: Equal sorted forms mean the words are anagrams.

16.invariant: Matching words join the same group.

17.why: It is confirmed to be an anagram of the anchor.
17.invariant: The group holds only mutual anagrams.

18.why: It is now grouped and off the table.

19.happening: Store the finished group into the answer.
19.invariant: GROUPS grows by one completed group.

init.happening: Set up the empty answer and the used flags.

loop.happening: Advance an index over the words.

check.happening: Compare sorted forms to test for anagrams.

update.happening: Grow a group and mark words used.
